Shows your bookmarks bar with 2x favicon icons and labels in a fast popup.

Big Favorites Bar / Chrome Icon Enlarger improves the visibility of extension icons in the Chrome toolbar by making them larger, clearer, and easier to click.

Chrome’s default extension icons can appear very small, especially on high-resolution monitors, large displays, or laptops with scaled UI settings. When you install many extensions, the toolbar quickly becomes cluttered and icons become difficult to recognize.

This extension solves that problem by enlarging Chrome extension icons, making your toolbar easier to navigate and improving productivity.

Whether you're a developer, power user, or someone who uses many browser tools, larger icons make a noticeable difference in everyday browsing.

🔧 Key Features

✔ Enlarges Chrome extension toolbar icons
✔ Improves visibility on high-resolution displays
✔ Makes extension buttons easier to click
✔ Works instantly after installation
✔ Lightweight and fast
✔ No configuration required
✔ Clean and simple design

💡 Why Use Bigger Chrome Toolbar Icons?

Many Chrome users install 10–30+ extensions, including tools for:

• development
• productivity
• crypto wallets
• SEO tools
• automation tools
• password managers

When the toolbar becomes crowded, Chrome shrinks the icons and they become difficult to see.

Chrome Icon Enlarger fixes this usability issue by making icons larger and easier to identify.

Benefits include:

• faster access to extensions
• easier visual recognition
• improved accessibility
• better usability on large monitors
• cleaner toolbar layout

🖥 Perfect For

• Developers using many extensions
• Productivity power users
• High-resolution or 4K monitors
• Users with accessibility needs
• Anyone tired of tiny toolbar icons

⚡ Lightweight and Private

This extension is designed to be extremely lightweight and runs entirely inside your browser.

It does not collect any data, does not track users, and does not send any information externally.

Everything works locally inside Chrome.

🔓 Open Source

This project is open source and available on GitHub:

https://github.com/mysticalg/Chrome-Icon-Enlarger

Contributions, feedback, and feature suggestions are welcome.

🚀 Improve Your Chrome Toolbar Today

If you want a cleaner, clearer, and easier-to-use Chrome toolbar, Chrome Icon Enlarger is the perfect solution.

Install it today and make your extension icons easier to see and use.

ChroMenu — A Chrome-style replacement menu bar.

ChroMenu is a replacement menu for Chrome-based browsers. It brings a traditional style main menu featuring File, Edit, View, History, and Bookmarks for those of us not wanting a Bookmarks Bar or Sidebars.
Sidebar extension for managing tabs in a tree structure

もう、タブの迷子にならない。
Chromeのサイドパネルを利用して、増えすぎたタブを「ツリー形式」や「最近使った順」でスマートに整理・管理できる究極のタブマネージャーです。

【魅力的な詳細説明】
「調べ物をしていたら、いつの間にかタブが細くなって中身が分からない…」
「さっきまで見ていたタブがどこにあるか見つからない」
そんなストレスを、Tree Tab Managerが解消します。

Google Chromeの最新機能（Side Panel API / Manifest V3）をフル活用し、ブラウジングを妨げない快適な操作感を実現しました。

【主な特徴】
🌿 視覚的に整理する「ツリー表示」
リンクから開いたタブを自動的に「親子関係」として階層表示。情報の関連性が一目でわかります。ドラッグ＆ドロップで親子関係を自由に入れ替えることも可能です。

🕐 迷わず戻れる「最近開いた順モード」
ツリー構造だけでなく、最後に使った時刻順にタブを並べ替えることができます。たくさんのタブを開きっぱなしにしていても、今必要なタブにすぐアクセスできます。

📂 完璧な「グループ機能」連携
Chrome標準のタブグループに完全対応。サイドパネルからグループの色変更や名前の編集、一括操作がスムーズに行えます。

📌 固定タブ（ピン）専用セクション
大事なタブは上部に固定。通常のタブと切り分けて表示されるため、常に使いたいツールを見失いません。

💾 安心の「セッション保存」
現在のタブの状態（親子関係やピン留め、グループ状況まで！）をまるごと保存。後から別のウィンドウで一気に復元できるので、作業の切り替えも自由自在です。

🔍 履歴・ブックマークもこれひとつで
タブ管理だけでなく、履歴やブックマークの閲覧・検索機能も搭載。サイドパネルを開くだけで、ブラウザ内のあらゆる情報にアクセス可能です。

【その他のこだわり機能】
3つの表示モード: 通常・コンパクト・ミニから、あなたの画面サイズに最適なデザインを選べます。

タブ名のカスタム: わかりにくいページタイトルを自分好みの名前に書き換え可能。

ドメインまとめ: 同じドメインのタブをワンクリックで子タブとして集約。

ダークモード対応: 目に優しいデザインで、長時間の作業をサポート。

【使い方は簡単】
拡張機能をインストール。

ツールバーの拡張機能アイコンをクリックしてサイドパネルを開く。

左側のタブ一覧から、新しいブラウジング体験をスタート！
A Chrome extension that easily saves bookmarks and quickly find target web pages.

A tool for quickly finding target web pages without the need for categorization; just save and search.

Saving Bookmarks:
* Page title (customizable).
* Page notes (page remarks, page descriptions, page tags, page categories, etc.; anything you can think of can be written).
* Saving and deleting bookmarks is simple and doesn't create psychological burden.

Searching Bookmarks:
* Quick search by entering keywords (separated by spaces) to quickly index the bookmarks you want to find.

Others:
* Supports data synchronization across multiple devices.
* Supports markdown format export and import.
Advanced bookmark management and link checking tool

Chrome Web Store Description

The ultimate bookmark manager for Chrome.
Maximize productivity with dual control: side panel and popup.

“Bookmark Manager & Link Checker Pro” is a Chrome extension that combines bookmark management and link checking in one tool.
It supports both a persistent side panel and a quick-access popup, allowing flexible workflows.

🌟 Two Operation Modes

Side Panel (Persistent View)
Keep your bookmarks always visible alongside your browser.
Drag and drop links directly from web pages into folders for efficient research.

Popup (Quick Access)
Open instantly by clicking the extension icon.
Perfect for quick bookmark access and lightweight actions.

🌟 Powerful Bookmark Management Features

Precision Drag & Drop
A “blue insertion indicator” shows exactly where items will be placed.
Easily organize bookmarks with intuitive controls.

Full Bookmark Access
View all bookmarks including bookmark bar and folders in one place.

Open Links in New Tabs
All links open in new tabs, so your current work is never interrupted.

🛠 Link Checker (with Saved Results)

Broken Link Checker
Scan bookmarks for broken links and dead links.
Results are automatically saved and persist even after closing the panel.

User Guide
1. How to Open

Popup
Click the toolbar icon for quick access.

Side Panel
Right-click the extension icon and select “Open side panel,”
or launch it from Chrome’s side panel.

2. Header Controls

Search
Instantly filter bookmarks across all folders.

Link Check
Click “Check” to scan bookmark links. Results are saved automatically.

3. Drag & Drop Tips

The “blue line” indicates insertion position.

Drop in folder center → Move into folder
Drop on edges → Reorder within same level

Keyboard hint mode: label targets on the page, type the hint to follow links and buttons.

UPDATE: More fonts and customizable font size 

KeySurge turns your keyboard into a supercharged navigation tool. Press the activation shortcut and every clickable target on the page gets a hint label. Type the label to instantly follow that link, click that button, or switch tabs — no mouse needed.

Features
- Instant hint mode — labels every link, button, and interactive element on the page
- Tab Search — press [ in hint mode to fuzzy-search and switch to any open tab
- Bookmark & History pickers — jump to any bookmark or recent page without lifting your hands
- XP Level system — earn XP with every click and progress through tiers: INIT → SCRIPT → CORE → KERNEL → DAEMON → PHANTOM and beyond
 - Live HUD — a compact overlay shows your current level and XP progress to the next tier while hints are open
- Stats dashboard — track total clicks, accuracy, average speed, fastest click, best streak, and 14-day activity
- Shareable stats card — export a PNG of your stats with speed sparkline and daily activity graph
- 17 themes
- Achievements — unlock badges as you hit milestones
- Accessibility-friendly — reduce motion mode, minimal mode, and custom UI fonts supported


All data stays local — no tracking, no remote servers, no account required.

Lightning-fast command palette for Chrome. Search tabs, bookmarks, history instantly. Arc-inspired design with frecency ranking.

Kord is a lightning-fast command palette for Chrome, inspired by Arc Browser and tools like Raycast.

  Press ⌘K (Mac) or Ctrl+K (Windows/Linux) to instantly search everything in your browser — without leaving
   the current tab.

  ────────────────────────
  FEATURES
  ────────────────────────

  🔍 UNIVERSAL SEARCH
  Search across all your open tabs, bookmarks, and browsing history in one place. Results appear in
  milliseconds.

  ⚡ FRECENCY RANKING
  Kord learns your habits. The more you use an item, the higher it ranks — so your most-visited pages
  always appear first.

  🖥️  BROWSER COMMANDS
  Execute common browser actions directly from the palette:
  • New Tab / Duplicate Tab
  • Close Tab / Close Other Tabs
  • Pin / Unpin Tab
  • Mute / Unmute Tab
  • Go Back / Go Forward
  • Reload Tab
  • Clear Cache & Refresh
  • Clear Cookies & Refresh
  • Open Downloads, Extensions, Settings, History
  • Restore Recently Closed Tabs

  🔖 BOOKMARK MANAGEMENT
  Search bookmarks instantly and open them in the current or a new tab.

  🕘 HISTORY SEARCH
  Find any page you've visited before, without opening the history page.

  ────────────────────────
  HOW TO USE
  ────────────────────────

  1. Press ⌘K or Ctrl+K on any page to open Kord
  2. Start typing to search tabs, bookmarks, or history
  3. Press Tab to switch to Command Mode for browser actions
  4. Use ↑↓ arrow keys to navigate, Enter to confirm, Esc to close

  ────────────────────────
  PRIVACY
  ────────────────────────

  Kord processes all data locally within your browser. No data is sent to external servers. Your browsing
  history and bookmarks never leave your device.
Automate & organize your bookmarks! Create folders & save pages based on website content with a single click.
Automate & organize your bookmarks into folders
Execute multiple extension actions with customizable hotkey chains

Hotkey Chain lets you execute a sequence of actions (an action chain) with a single hotkey, improving browsing efficiency. You can visually edit action chains with drag-and-drop sorting, per-step delays, command execution, and extension management.

- Main Features
  - Run an action chain with one click; supports multiple chains and drag-and-drop sorting
  - Page and tab operations: scroll to top/bottom, refresh, forward/back, open/close/duplicate/pin tabs
  - Content and zoom: copy URL/title, add bookmark, focus address bar, zoom in/out/reset
  - Advanced capabilities: clear cache, wait, execute commands, call other extensions
  - Extension management: enable/disable, uninstall (with confirmation), open options/details/homepage, reload development extensions

- Usage
  - After installation, create/edit action chains in the extension’s “Options” page; click the toolbar icon to run the default chain
  - Set custom hotkeys (e.g., run chain 1/2/3) at `chrome://extensions/shortcuts`

- Internationalization
  - Built-in English/Simplified Chinese; switch languages in the “Options” page to localize menus, notifications, etc.

- Privacy & Local Storage
  - Configuration is stored only in local/synced storage; no collection or transmission of personal data; no changes to search or homepage settings

This extension shows you all your bookmarks on a new-tab. It makes it easier to find you frequently used bookmarks.

Hope you enjoy using it 👍
Dedicated-window command shell for tabs, windows, and groups.

BMXt is a UI demonstration for keyboard-centric browser operation on Chrome.
It exists because the author is not satisfied with today’s out-of-the-box browser experience.

It has a terminal-style prompt and log, but rather than being a classic terminal emulator alone, it is designed as a broad command surface for steering the whole browser—so you can keep your hands on the keyboard in a relaxed posture and cut down on how often you reach for tabs and windows.

Command output and typed command history are handled primarily in memory for the UI; only capped fields are persisted in chrome.storage.local. The extension page and service worker are not designed to call fetch() against arbitrary third-party HTTPS URLs (the packaged manifest’s CSP, including connect-src, reinforces this). Optional http(s) site access is requested at runtime only when you run commands that inject scripts into web pages.

◆About the name — a play on Browser Manipulator X Terminal:

- X
  - UX improvement
  - A hope that many different people can use it in crossover ways
  - Exponential growth and open-ended possibility through combining commands
- t
  - The first letter of Terminal
  - The idea of an extension layered onto your browser, carried in the letter t

The road has only just begun, but the author values your voices—so they decided to publish on the Chrome Web Store.
They believe the keyboard in front of you can take you “anywhere,” and will keep stacking features while building BMXt as a tool that stays human-centered.


◆Feedback
- Feedback and wishes from using the extension
https://github.com/UNRsports/bmxt/issues
https://x.com/ny0n150226


◆Disclaimer
BMXt is an experimental / trial implementation. UNRsports (the developer) is not liable for any incidents, loss, or damage arising from your use of the extension. You use BMXt at your own discretion and risk.


◆Version history
0.4.0:
- Fixed bugs in nav mode behavior
- Added translation assist (`translate -on` / `translate -off`)
- Adjusted Tab completion menu behavior
- Fixed welcome page open behavior

0.3.8:
- Show a welcome page on install and when the extension version is upgraded
- Fixed tabs mode filtering so keyboard focus no longer jumps to the list unexpectedly
- Revised mouse interaction: text in the prompt and log can be selected while keeping keyboard-first operation as the default
- Improved in-browser cross-search (`find`)
- Improved Tab completion menu behavior

0.3.5:
- Removed Rust to reduce package size
- Added the `:edit` subcommand in tabs mode for editing tab groups and window names
- Implemented IME-style input assistance while typing commands
- Moved list pickers for all commands to side columns beside the terminal and revised picker interaction (`Esc` returns to the prompt; close a column with `<cmd> -exit -list`)
- DOM list picker: focus rows with ↑/↓ and scroll the target page to the matching element
- Added nav mode: virtual cursor overlay on the active tab (`nav -enter`; Alt toggles ON/OFF; arrows move; Enter click/type; Ctrl context menu for text selection, image save, and reload)


0.2.1:
- Added the `dom` command so you can inspect the page source.
- Added the `find` command to search across internal data such as history, bookmarks, and open tabs.

0.1.1:
- Added the split command; add panes with split and remove them with exit (closes the window when the last pane exits)
- With multiple panes from split, Ctrl+Arrow moves focus between panes
- Clarified command behavior rules
- Added an assist menu while typing commands (type "tabs" and press Enter to try it)
- In tabs mode, "/" search: type a phrase and press Enter to highlight matches; press n to jump between them

0.0.9:
- Tab name search and highlight reset in tabs mode now follow Vim-style behavior (clear highlighted matches with :nohlsearch)
- Improved how release notes are specified and shown

◆Commands

| Command | Description |
|----------|------|
| `help` / `?` | Show help |
| `clear` | Clear logs |
| `exit` | Close the BMXt window and clear the session log |
| `split` | Show `-col` / `-row` options; Enter alone restores the prompt to `split ` (with a trailing space); `split -col` adds a pane beside the current one; `split -row` adds a pane below; with multiple panes, Ctrl+Arrow moves focus between panes |
| `tabs` | Show available options, then restore the prompt to `tabs ` (with a trailing space) for continued input |
| `tabs -list [-u]` | Open the tab picker; supports search, multi-select marker `#`, and bulk modes; `/` searches tab titles, Enter highlights matches, `n` jumps between them |
| `tabs -moveurl <url>` | Focus a tab with the given URL or open a new tab (http/https) |
| `tabs -nowurl` | Show the current tab’s URL |
| `dom` | Print available options; Enter alone restores the prompt to `dom ` (trailing space) for the next token |
| `dom -list [--html|--react] [<pattern>]` | Open a read-only DOM picker for the active tab (same picker chrome as `find -list`); flavor `--html` (default) or `--react`; optional `<pattern>` filters rendered lines with a case-insensitive substring (not a regex). ↑/↓ focus scrolls the target tab to the highlighted element. Scriptable http(s) pages only; may prompt for optional site access |
| `nav` | Print usage; Enter alone restores the prompt to `nav ` (trailing space) for `-enter` or `-exit` |
| `nav -enter` | Arm nav mode; **Alt** toggles the virtual cursor overlay on the target tab; arrows move; **Enter** click/type; **Ctrl** opens a context menu (text selection, save image, reload, history) |
| `nav -exit` | Fully disarm nav (turn the overlay **OFF** with **Alt** first) |
| `find` | Print available options; Enter alone restores the prompt to `find ` for a subcommand or flag |
| `find -list [--none|--history|--bookmark|--page] <pattern>` | Open a cross-search picker; default `--none` searches browsing history, bookmarks, and visible text in non-discarded http(s) tabs together; use one flag to limit scope. Case-insensitive substring match (no regex in v1) |
| `find --none <pattern>` | Search all three scopes in one go (log output; empty pattern returns capped “all” style hits) |
| `find --history <pattern>` | Search recent history titles/URLs only |
| `find --bookmark <pattern>` | Search bookmark titles/URLs only |
| `find --page <pattern>` | Search visible text in loaded http(s) tabs; may prompt for optional site access at runtime |
| `close` / `c <tabId>` | Close a tab |
| `group new <tabId> …` | Create a group |
| `notes` | Show release notes for the current extension version; `notes <version>` for a specific version (e.g. `0.1.1`); `notes --list` lists versions that have entries |
Let Me Search | Your Bookmarks on Steroid
Productivity & Search Tool: Instantly Save and Search Your Best Finds on the Internet.

CAPTURE AND RECALL INFORMATION
It's hard to capture and recall information later. Ever email yourself a link or save a screenshot in a folder on your computer? If so, then this may be the solution you've been looking for.


MAKE ANYTHING SEARCHABLE
Let Me Search is the search engine for your life. Think bookmarks on steroids 💪.

Get full-text, typo tolerant, search-as-you-type personal search engine that helps you index anything on the internet while solving the pain of finding relevant information when you need it.


HOW DOES IT WORK
Once you have a Let Me Search account, use the Chrome Extension to:

💾 SAVE ANYTHING
Highlight your favorite text, save images, or entire webpages.

🔍 SEARCH INSTANTLY
Easily search, recall and revisit your saves and highlights.

📂 ORGANIZE INTO FOLDERS
Organize and Catalog Your Saves into Folders.

🏷️ FILTERING AND FACETING
Refine Your Search Results to Find Exact Matches.

👀 SHARE
Share Your Saves With Anyone Online. Allow Others to Search Your Highlights, Screenshots, and Bookmarks.

📄 SAVE TABS
Better manage your browsing experience by saving tabs for later. And yes they'll be searchable.



Get Started for FREE! Get Your Personal Search Engine Today.

Have a suggestion, question, or feedback? Please reach out: letmesearch@okaysend.com 👋

A powerful command palette for Chrome, inspired by VSCode and Raycast

# ProBar Command Palette

A powerful command palette for Chrome, inspired by VSCode and Raycast. Quickly search and navigate through your bookmarks, tabs, and history with a modern, keyboard-driven interface.

## Features

- 🔍 Search through bookmarks, tabs, and history
- ⌨️ Keyboard-first navigation
- 🌙 Dark mode support
- 🎨 Modern, clean UI with smooth animations
- ⚡ Fast and responsive
Save and manage RSS feeds as bookmarks with read/unread tracking

Native RSS Feeds in Your Bookmarks
Add and manage RSS feeds directly in Chrome Bookmarks — no third-party services, no duplicate sync issues.
Built-in read/unread tracking keeps your feeds organized and up to date.

Feeds are saved under:
Other Bookmarks / RSS Feeds / ...

You can organize them into custom folders — for example:

A new patented shortcut tool that calls history and bookmarks from 'just the right spot'. Also restores tabs and calls them in bulk.

Ver.3.1.5 In addition to the traditional mode, we've added a mode where the bookmark list opens simply by hovering over the ghost interface. We've also implemented light mode and dark mode switching. Click the extension icon to open the settings screen and configure to your preference.

Source code:
https://github.com/ogiharadevelopment/GhostInTheChrome

The red dashed line does not appear on the browser's top page. Please use it while actually browsing the web.

Video 1: A video demonstrating the user experience.

Image 1: Point to the red dashed line with your mouse.

Image 2: Rotate the wheel between the mouse buttons. Press ”;” to open detailed instructions.

Image 3: Scroll up to open history, scroll down to open bookmarks. For long lists, you can open from just the right position.


Transparent Five-Tool Gadget
１.Restore tabs
２.Open specified pages all at once
３.Jump to the perfect point in your history
４.Jump to the perfect point in your bookmarks
５.Quick access to your favorite pages

Just hover the mouse over the Ghost Interface—outlined in red at the upper right of any page—and press keyboard keys or scroll the wheel. That single action switches among five features.
The Ghost Interface allows clicks to pass through.

1. Save every open tab as URLs for later.
The Ghost Interface has three zones: left, center, and right. Each zone changes the red outline to yellow, green, or blue when you hover over it.
Yellow (left) + number key (1–9): stores the URLs of all open tabs under that number.
Green (center) + number key: shows the list tied to that number.
Blue (right) + number key: opens every page from that list at once.

2. Save the entire session and restore it with a single key.
This uses Chrome’s native session restore feature. Operation is the same as above, but you use letter keys (a–z) instead of numbers.

3. View bookmark lists from exactly the right spot.
Hover inside the interface to display “N%.” N represents the pointer’s position between the left edge (0%) and right edge (100%). If you have 100 bookmarks, moving to 50% and scrolling down shows the list starting around the 50th bookmark.

4. View browsing history from exactly the right spot.
With N% visible, scrolling up reveals history using the same logic. Pressing Ctrl inside the interface cycles through modes: normal → border hidden → sleep → back to normal.
Pressing @ while hovering in the center displays a list of recently closed tabs/windows at the corresponding N% position.

5. Manage your personal “GhostFAB” favorites.
Shift + wheel up adds the current page to GhostFAB.
Shift + wheel down shows the GhostFAB list.

This extension features the Ghost Interface GUI, already granted a patent by the Japan Patent Office. Additional related patents are pending.
Developed by Ogi Development.

https://x.com/OgiDevelopment

タブをグループ別に一覧表示し、検索・ブックマーク追加・リーディングリスト管理をワンクリックで実現するタブマネージャー。

【主な機能】
  ・タブグループ別のカラー分類表示
  ・タブの検索（タイトル・URLで絞り込み）
  ・ワンクリックでブックマーク追加
  ・リーディングリスト管理（未読/既読表示）
  ・非アクティブタブの可視化（1時間以上未使用）
  ・タブの即座切り替え・クローズ

  【表示モード】
  ・Side Panel: Chrome の右パネルに固定表示（最も安定）
  ・Floating Panel: ページ上に浮くドラッグ可能なパネル

  【カスタマイズ】
  ・ダークモード対応
  ・コンパクトモード（情報密度を向上）
  ・グループの折りたたみ状態を記憶

  【プライバシー】
  ・すべてのデータはローカル保存のみ
  ・外部サーバーへのデータ送信なし
  ・アナリティクス・トラッキング一切なし

Organize and manage your bookmarks with smart categories

Mark Buddy – Your Zero-Friction Bookmark Assistant
Are you overwhelmed by open tabs and lost links? Mark Buddy is the solution—a private, in-browser bookmark manager designed to bring order to your digital life with zero friction.

What is Mark Buddy?
Mark Buddy is a powerful yet simple browser extension that helps you organize, search, and manage your bookmarks directly in your browser. Whether you’re a professional, student, educator, or anyone who wants to keep their digital life tidy, Mark Buddy is built for you.

Why Choose Mark Buddy?
- Instant Organization: Start organizing your bookmarks the moment you install. No complicated setup, no accounts, and no syncing required.
- One-Click Cleanup: Effortlessly delete old or unwanted bookmarks with a single click, keeping your collection fresh and relevant.
- Smart Search: Quickly find any bookmark by keyword, date, or tag. Never lose track of important links again.
- Easy Export & Import: Export your bookmarks as .txt or .mrk files for easy sharing, backup, or migration. Seamlessly import your bookmarks from Chrome, Brave, or Edge—your categories and organization are preserved.
- Dark Mode: Enjoy a clean, modern interface that’s easy on the eyes, day or night.

- 100% Local & Private: Your data stays on your device. Mark Buddy never uploads your bookmarks or tracks your activity. Full privacy policy available on our website.( https://markbuddy.tyagi.cloud/privacy-policy.html ).


Who is Mark Buddy For?
- Product Managers: Keep research, client links, and resources organized.
- Educators: Manage class materials, lesson plans, and resource links.
- Creators: Curate toolkits, inspiration, and shareable resources.
- Teams: Build internal knowledge bases and collaborative link libraries.
- Students: Organize learning resources, research, and personal libraries.
- Anyone: If you’re tired of “link chaos,” Mark Buddy is for you.

Key Features
- Zero Setup: Just install and start organizing—no registration or configuration needed.
- Quick Access: Open Mark Buddy instantly with Ctrl + Q.
- One-Click Delete: Remove stale or unwanted bookmarks in seconds.
- Advanced Search: Filter bookmarks by keyword, date, or custom tags.
- Flexible Export: Share or back up your bookmarks in multiple formats.
- Seamless Migration: Move your bookmarks between browsers with ease.
- Dark Mode: Focus-friendly interface for day or night use.
- Full Privacy: Your bookmarks are never uploaded or shared.

What’s Next for Mark Buddy?
- We’re constantly improving Mark Buddy based on user feedback. Upcoming features include:
- Collaborative bookmarking for teams and groups
- Link previews for faster browsing
- Save text snippets alongside your bookmarks
- GitHub & docs-friendly export formats
- Power-user shortcuts for even faster organization

Why Install Mark Buddy?
Mark Buddy is designed to save you time, reduce stress, and help you stay organized—without sacrificing your privacy. If you’re tired of losing important links or managing endless tabs, Mark Buddy is the assistant you’ve been waiting for.

Take control of your bookmarks today with Mark Buddy—your private, zero-friction assistant for a calmer, more organized browser.
